items.description: FluentWinForms is a modern engine for WinForms that merges the declarative simplicity of CSS with the visual power of WinUI, powered by SkiaSharp and entirely in C#. It delivers effects like Ripple, Acrylic, Shadows and animations at 120 FPS without the complexity of XAML.
